queries.question: What are the full names of customers with the highest total balance in their accounts and who is the the CEO of the branches they use?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    c.fullName,
    SUM(a.balance) AS Total_Balance,
    b.Ceo
FROM Customers c
JOIN Accounts a
    ON c.customerId = a.customerId
JOIN Banks b
    ON c.bankID = b.id
GROUP BY c.customerId
ORDER BY Total_Balance DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname (SUM(?balance_a) AS ?agg) ?ceo WHERE {
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?c p:customerId ?customerid_g .
  ?c p:name ?fullname .
  ?a p:balance ?balance_a .
  ?b p:Ceo ?ceo .
}
GROUP BY ?customerid_g ?fullname ?ceo
ORDER BY DESC(?agg)

queries.question: What are the full names of customers with the highest total balance in their accounts and who runs the branches they use?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    c.fullName,

FROM Customers c

    ON c.customerId = a.customerId
JOIN Banks b
    ON c.bankID = b.id
GROUP BY c.customerId
ORDER BY Total_Balance DESC

queries.question: What are the full names of customers with the highest total balance in their accounts and who runs the branches they use?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    c.fullName,

    b.Ceo, Management_Team
FROM Customers c
JOIN Accounts a
    ON c.customerId = a.customerId
JOIN Banks b
    ON c.bankID = b.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>

  ?a a :Accounts .

  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .

queries.question: List the management team members of the bank that receives the greatest monthly payment.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    b.Management_Team AS Bank_Leader
FROM Banks b
JOIN Customers c
    ON b.id = c.bankID
JOIN Loans l
    ON c.customerId = l.customerId
GROUP BY 
    b.Management_Team
ORDER BY 
    monthlyPayment DESC
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?mt WHERE { ?b a :Banks ; p:Management_Team ?mt . ?c p:hasBanks ?b . ?l p:hasCustomers ?c ; p:monthlyPayment ?mp } GROUP BY ?mt ORDER BY DESC(MAX(xsd:double(?mp))) LIMIT 1
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): ORDER BY non-grouped monthlyPayment after GROUP BY; NL = management team of bank

queries.question: List the CEO and management team members of the bank that receives the greatest monthly payment.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    b.Ceo, Management_Team AS Bank_Leader
FROM Banks b
JOIN Customers c
    ON b.id = c.bankID
JOIN Loans l
    ON c.customerId = l.customerId
GROUP BY 
    b.Ceo, Management_Team
ORDER BY 
    monthlyPayment DESC
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?ceo ?mt WHERE { ?b a :Banks ; p:Ceo ?ceo ; p:Management_Team ?mt . ?c p:hasBanks ?b . ?l p:hasCustomers ?c ; p:monthlyPayment ?mp } GROUP BY ?ceo ?mt ORDER BY DESC(MAX(xsd:double(?mp))) LIMIT 1
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): ORDER BY non-grouped monthlyPayment; NL = CEO+management team of bank with great

queries.question: Who runs the bank that receives the greatest monthly payments each month?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    b.Ceo AS Bank_Leader
FROM Banks b
JOIN Customers c
    ON b.id = c.bankID
JOIN Loans l
    ON c.customerId = l.customerId
GROUP BY 
    b.Ceo
ORDER BY 
    monthlyPayment DESC
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?ceo WHERE { ?b a :Banks ; p:Ceo ?ceo . ?c p:hasBanks ?b . ?l p:hasCustomers ?c ; p:monthlyPayment ?mp } GROUP BY ?ceo ORDER BY DESC(MAX(xsd:double(?mp))) LIMIT 1
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): ORDER BY non-grouped monthlyPayment; NL = CEO of bank with greatest monthly paym

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the full names of customers with the highest total balance in their accounts and who runs the branches they use?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?fullname (SUM(?balance_a) AS ?agg) ?ceo WHERE {
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?c p:customerId ?customerid_g .
  ?c p:name ?fullname .
  ?a p:balance ?balance_a .
  ?b p:Ceo ?ceo .
}
GROUP BY ?customerid_g ?fullname ?ceo
ORDER BY DESC(?agg) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?fullname (SUM(?balance_a) AS ?agg) ?management_team WHERE {
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?c p:customerId ?customerid_g .
  ?c p:name ?fullname .
  ?a p:balance ?balance_a .
  ?b p:Management_Team ?management_team .
}
GROUP BY ?customerid_g ?fullname ?management_team
ORDER BY DESC(?agg) }
  full: { SELECT ?fullname (SUM(?balance_a) AS ?agg) ?ceo ?management_team WHERE {
  ?c a :Customers .
  ?a a :Accounts .
  ?a p:hasCustomers ?c .
  ?b a :Banks .
  ?c p:hasBanks ?b .
  ?c p:customerId ?customerid_g .
  ?c p:name ?fullname .
  ?a p:balance ?balance_a .
  ?b p:Ceo ?ceo .
  ?b p:Management_Team ?management_team .
}
GROUP BY ?customerid_g ?fullname ?ceo ?management_team
ORDER BY DESC(?agg) }
}
